SEARCH

Package neqsim.process.fastsimulation

package neqsim.process.fastsimulation
Fast process-simulation proxies based on cached thermodynamic information from one rigorous base-case run.

The package starts with a K-value proxy: a solved ProcessSystem is scanned once, per-unit vapour/liquid equilibrium ratios K = y/x and fallback component split factors are frozen, and later scenario sweeps are propagated through the same process graph without running equation-of-state flashes in every unit. Separator-like two-outlet units use the cached K-values with a Rachford-Rice split, and gas/oil/water separators use cached gas/oil and water/oil ratios with a two-variable phase-fraction solve. Single-outlet and non-flash units use conservative pass-through routing; unsupported multi-outlet units fall back to the frozen split factors from the base case.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
  • Related Packages

    Description
    neqsim.process
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    KValueProcessBenchmarkResult
    Timing and conservation summary for a K-value proxy benchmark against rigorous process reruns.
    KValueProcessResult
    Result from a K-value fast process simulation.
    KValueProcessSimulator
    Fast process simulator that reuses cached unit K-values from one rigorous base-case run.
    KValueUnitProfile
    Frozen K-value and fallback split-factor profile for one process unit.
